## Checklist

- [ ] Follows coding style in `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] All new public APIs have XML doc comments
- [ ] New `.cs` files have paired `.meta` files
- [ ] Config Validator passes (`Tools → Endless Engine → Config Validator`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Version bumped in `package.json` if shipping new behavior
